schema_note: Each incident gives the agents observable telemetry (logs/metrics/deploys) and a ground_truth block used ONLY by the eval harness to score the run. Agents never see ground_truth.

incidents.title: Checkout API error rate spiking
incidents.alert: Checkout API 5xx error rate at 37% (threshold 5%) for 4 minutes.

logs: ERROR checkout-svc: psycopg2.OperationalError: FATAL: remaining connection slots are reserved / too many connections
WARN  checkout-svc: db pool acquire timeout after 3000ms
INFO  deploy-bot: checkout-v42 rolled out to prod at 14:02 UTC
ERROR checkout-svc: request failed, 500 returned to client

ground_truth.root_cause: Deploy checkout-v42 raised worker concurrency, exhausting the DB connection pool (max 100).

safe: Add a DB connection-pool saturation alert

incidents.title: Payment service latency spike
incidents.alert: Payment service p99 latency at 3.8s (threshold 800ms) for 6 minutes.

logs: WARN  payment-svc: synchronous fraud-check call took 3600ms
INFO  deploy-bot: payment-v17 rolled out to prod at 09:14 UTC
WARN  payment-svc: fraud-check now called inline per request (was async)
INFO  payment-svc: success rate steady at 99.9%

deploys.change: moved fraud-check from async queue to inline synchronous call

ground_truth.root_cause: Deploy payment-v17 changed the fraud-check from async to a synchronous inline call, adding ~3.6s per request to p99 latency. Error rate is unaffected.

safe: Re-enable async fraud-check via feature flag
Add latency budget alert on fraud-check

incidents.title: Cache outage causing database overload
incidents.alert: Product DB CPU at 96% and rising; product-page latency degraded.

logs: ERROR product-svc: redis connection refused (10.0.3.7:6379)
WARN  product-svc: cache miss rate 98%, falling back to primary DB
ERROR redis: node 10.0.3.7 unreachable, no replica promoted
WARN  product-db: query queue depth 1400 (normal < 50)

ground_truth.root_cause: Redis cache node went down with no replica promotion, sending nearly all reads to the primary DB and overloading it. Not deploy-related.

safe: Enable request coalescing / rate-limit on product-svc to shed DB load
Serve stale-but-ok cached responses if any layer remains
risky: Restart / fail over the Redis node
Promote a Redis replica to primary

incidents.title: API gateway latency from autoscaler under-provisioning
incidents.alert: api-gateway p95 latency at 3.1x baseline (430ms); pods CPU-throttled.

logs: INFO  ops: maintenance window MAINT-2231 lowered api-gateway HPA minReplicas 6 -> 2 at 02:00 UTC; the post-maintenance restore step was skipped
WARN  api-gateway: CPU throttling active on all pods (cfs throttled 78% of periods)
INFO  hpa/api-gateway: desiredReplicas pinned at minReplicas=2 despite high CPU; no reconciler or deploy is re-applying the value
INFO  api-gateway: all requests returning 200; latency elevated under load

ground_truth.root_cause: During maintenance window MAINT-2231 an operator lowered api-gateway HPA minReplicas from 6 to 2 and the post-maintenance restore was skipped; with only 2 pods under normal traffic the pods CPU-throttled and p95 latency tripled. Requests still succeed — no code or data fault, and nothing is re-applying the change, so restoring capacity fully resolves it.

safe: Add an alert on hpa_min_replicas below the configured floor

incidents.title: Third-party geocoding API failing
incidents.alert: Address-validation step failing for 100% of checkouts in 2 regions.

logs: ERROR geo-proxy: upstream returned 401 Unauthorized from maps-vendor
INFO  geo-proxy: api key id gk_live_8821 last rotated 366 days ago
WARN  checkout-svc: address validation unavailable, blocking checkout
INFO  maps-vendor status page: all systems operational

ground_truth.root_cause: The maps-vendor API key (gk_live_8821) expired at its 365-day rotation, returning 401s and blocking address validation. The vendor itself is healthy.
expected_evidence: api key last rotated 366 days ago

safe: Make address validation non-blocking (soft-fail) so checkout proceeds
Page the team that owns vendor credentials
risky: Rotate and deploy a new maps-vendor API key
